form.formComment: Last start solid effort when 2nd (Fr6) over 1730m after being wide early at Bathurst, at the bell was leading 3.1 beaten 1.1 m by Willows Girl (2:01.50) in 3yo G2 No NR F on March 28 at $9. Two runs back won by 5 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Bathurst (2:03.50) beating Yirradiva in 3yo No NR F on March 23 at $1.05 at the bell was leading 2.1. Smart filly with a terrific record at this distance and can continue her strong Australian form.
